title: hieracium murorum subsp. orbicans
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. orbicans, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family. Traditionally, Hawkweed has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can aid in wound healing and reduce pain and swelling. The health benefits of Hawkweed include its ability to stimulate the immune system and increase blood flow, making it useful for treating conditions such as eczema, varicose veins, and poor circulation. Hawkweed can be prepared as an herbal infusion or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
